title: hypericum hircinum subsp. albimontanum
intro: Hypericum hircinum subsp. albimontanum, also known as the yellow st. john's wort or mountain St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hypericum hircinum subsp. albimontanum include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and anxiety disorders, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine.
